headline: WILLIAMS SONOMA PARTNERS WITH KELLY WEARSTLER TO CELEBRATE BREVILLE’S NEW MIXED METALS COLLECTION
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 14, 2026--Kelly Wearstler for Breville Mixed Metals Now Available Exclusively to Williams Sonoma

headline: Williams-Sonoma names president of Rejuvenation
summary: In the role, longtime company veteran Aujsha Taylor will oversee the banner’s merchandising strategies, product innovation and growth initiatives.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Williams-Sonoma, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Oliver Wintermantel   maintains Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $190 to $200.
